name: Task-demand target
role: Define the computation that an actuator must realize
replaceable_by: standard task generator; real task protocol
notes: Exp30 explicit mixtures are historical; Exp31 queries one random value to remove algebraic shortcuts

name: Associative key memory
notes: Dense capacity-limited keys replace the historical one-hot exact-retrieval shortcut

name: Reward-only controller
role: Select an executed actuator from local scalar feedback
notes: No true context descriptor unexecuted reward or candidate utility enters the API

name: Persistent feedback eligibility
role: Assign delayed scalar feedback to executed history
notes: Full-stream scores charge exploration and adaptation; the opposite control is not budget matched

name: Frozen visual encoder
role: Map raw frames to shared embeddings
notes: Identical frozen weights and transforms across every paired Exp34 condition

name: Support prototype memory
role: Bind each held-out user object from clean support
replaceable_by: nearest neighbour; linear head; Naive Bayes
notes: All clean frames are eligible; forbidden clean-video annotations are excluded

name: Diagonal gain motif
notes: No query quality annotation or query label is available

name: Delta association motif
role: Write bounded class associations into a fast state
notes: Support-only writes are audited and query labels are unavailable

name: Temporal accumulation motif
role: Maintain causal class evidence through clutter
input_format: current class evidence and previous state
notes: Uses only current and earlier frames and resets at a video boundary

name: Causal consensus belief
role: Select a motif from prediction persistence
input_format: current motif predictions and past within-video counts
notes: Deterministic tie order is frozen; no labels future frames autograd or BPTT

name: Task head
role: Decode object identity from a common class map
notes: The class map is formed from support only

name: Full-bank cost accounting
role: Charge every computed motif and controller state
output_format: event L1 state bytes and optional MACs
notes: Current Exp34 has no efficiency claim because all four motifs execute

name: High-rank E/I carrier
role: Execute selected effective currents in a participating state
notes: Future claim only; no output bypass and must retain task gain with closure and contraction
